arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale opens up on 'difficult' decision to leave Arsenal
arts.sum: Speaking to Sky Sports about his decision to leave the Emirates Stadium, Ramsdale revealed that he left the club in search of regular minutes in the Premier League: Since then, the goalkeeper has started four Premier League games for the Saints, just two starts shy of his total for the 2023/24 campaign at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop early Mikel Merino team news hint for Southampton clash
arts.sum: "We had to modify training for a lot of players," Mikel Arteta said when asked for the latest on White and Timber amid their training absence. As such, it is unclear who Arteta will deploy on the right of defence especially with Takehiro Tomiyasu only just returning to training following a two-month injury absence.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Southampton - TV channel and live stream details
arts.sum: Ahead of the match against Southampton Arsenal sit in third place in the Premier League table. As ever, highlights of the game will be available to watch on Match of the Day on Saturday night.
